tasks.label: colcon build
tasks.command: for f in /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash /opt/ros2_jazzy/install/setup.bash; do [ -f "$f" ] && . "$f" && break; done && colcon build --packages-select ros2_example --symlink-install --cmake-args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo
tasks.detail: Build the ros2_example package (optimized + debug info)

tasks.label: colcon build (Debug)
tasks.command: for f in /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash /opt/ros2_jazzy/install/setup.bash; do [ -f "$f" ] && . "$f" && break; done && colcon build --packages-select ros2_example --symlink-install --cmake-args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug
tasks.detail: Unoptimized build for clean single-stepping in gdb

tasks.label: run zero_copy_pubsub
tasks.detail: Build then run the producer/consumer demo (Ctrl+C to stop)
